terraform.instructions: Add KMS key and enable storage_encrypted on the database resource.

kubernetes.instructions: Update the image tag to the patched version to resolve the CVE.
kubernetes.content:
# In your deployment.yaml, update:
image: {fix_version}  # Patched — CVE resolved
# Then apply: kubectl apply -f deployment.yaml

iam.instructions: Add MFA condition to enforce MFA for access to this resource.

terraform.instructions: Add API Gateway with Cognito Authorizer between PUBLIC and PRIVATE zones.

Q-001.title: Migrate to ML-KEM-768 (Post-Quantum)
Q-001.notes: Replace RSA/ECC key exchange with ML-KEM-768 (NIST FIPS 203, August 2024). This protects against HNDL attacks — nation-states recording your encrypted data today for future quantum decryption. Timeline: 3-6 month migration. Reference: https://csrc.nist.gov/pubs/fips/203/final

iam.instructions: Replace wildcard (*) actions with specific least-privilege actions.
